latin: Claram et praesentem periculum aliquod video. Ronaldus amicum suum ad silvam duxit. ibi omnes curas deposuerunt. cibus, ignis, silentium — haec sola opus sunt.

questions.prompt: Where does Ron take his friend?
What does Ron think is all one needs?

translation: I see a clear and present danger. Ron took his friend to the woods. There they set down all their worries. Food, fire, silence — these alone are needed.
